periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Cloudy, with a low around 61. Northeast wind around 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Friday
periods.detailed_forecast: Rain showers likely. Cloudy, with a high near 66. Northeast wind around 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Friday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: Rain showers likely. Cloudy, with a low around 61. Northeast wind 8 to 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

periods.name: Saturday
periods.detailed_forecast: Rain showers likely before 2pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 76. East wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
